explanations.5: The package*.json pattern matches both package.json and package-lock.json (the asterisk is a wildcard), and --chown=node:node makes sure the node user owns these files instead of root.
explanations.12: This command tells Cypress to check that it's properly installed and ready to run, catching any setup problems before tests actually start.
explanations.14: Switching to the node user means the rest of the container runs as a non-root user, which is a security best practice.
